style="swimlane;startSize=40;fillColor=#e6f2ff;strokeColor=#0066cc;html=1;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="<b>Building Blocks + IBM Bob の場合</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="1090" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bb-time" parent="bb-container" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=14;fontColor=#0066cc;fontStyle=1" value="<b>所要時間: 数時間〜1日</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="300" x="20" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bb-1" parent="bb-container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffcccc;strokeColor=#cc0000;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13;" value="<b>要件定義</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="40" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bb-2" parent="bb-container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#cce5ff;strokeColor=#0066cc;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13;" value="<b>Building Blocks<br>インストール</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="200" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bb-3" parent="bb-container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#cce5ff;strokeColor=#0066cc;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13;" value="<b>IBM Bob で<br>コード生成</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="360" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bb-4" parent="bb-container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccffcc;strokeColor=#00cc00;strokeWidth=3;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1" value="<b>完成</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="520" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bb-arrow1" edge="1" parent="bb-container" source="bb-1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#666666;" target="bb-2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bb-arrow2" edge="1" parent="bb-container" source="bb-2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#666666;" target="bb-3" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bb-arrow3" edge="1" parent="bb-container" source="bb-3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#666666;" target="bb-4" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
